TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Sao_tome_and_principe, title = Sao_tome_and_principe, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sao_tome_and_principe} }

S.FORM: Sao tome and principe hya' ga cyux maki' tay 1 00 N, 7 00 E na Xweco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 964 sq km (maki' tay 185ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 964 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 0 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 197,541. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 50.70% , lhlahuy hya' ga 28.10%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 21.20%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Sao Tome. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 12 na tay mpitu' byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Evaristo Carvalho, aring ryax 3 squ byacing tay 9 sa kawas 2016 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®

Sao tome and principe hya' ga cyux maki' tay 1 00 N, 7 00 E na Xweco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 964 sq km (maki' tay 185ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 964 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 0 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 197,541. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 50.70% , lhlahuy hya' ga 28.10%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 21.20%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Sao Tome. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 12 na tay mpitu' byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Evaristo Carvalho, aring ryax 3 squ byacing tay 9 sa kawas 2016 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: s~…ēao tome an* prin ¶~ ®ipe ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®jux maki Ē taj * ** n, * ** e na xwe ¶~ ®o s~…ējuw. kwara Ē kiŇčńß ¶~ ®ijan nija Ē *** s~…ēq km (maki Ē taj ***…£ink…£an kin wańß ¶~ ®i Ē) (kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē nija Ē …£a *** s~…ēq km , kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē na laws~…ēajan ws~…ēiluŇč ńßja Ē …£a * s~…ēq km) kinkńßmajan kwara Ē s~…ēquliq ńßja Ē …£a ***,***. pinő≤ ¶~ ®jan nańßa Ē s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē rńßzjal ńßja Ē ij pqmańßun ńßja Ē …£a **.**% , lńßlańßuj ńßja Ē …£a **.**%, s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē s~…ēa pptzjuwaw s~…ēa ő≤zinańß ńßja Ē …£a **.**%. s~…ēpzjaŇč qalaŇč na kokka Ē s~…ēpzjaŇč nańßa Ē krańßu Ē qalaŇč ńßja Ē …£a s~…ēao tome. s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē ńßja Ē …£a ** na taj mpitu Ē ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč na qutux kawas~…ē. mrńßuw kokka Ē mrńßuw kokka Ē ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a e*aris~…ēto ¶~ ®ar*alńßo, ariŇč rjax * s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē ¶~ ®ia ***
